name: Kiddie Frozen Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the milk with the pudding mix as directed on the package.
2. Pour the mixture into a freezer tray and freeze until it becomes mushy.
3. Stir in the crumbled cookies and pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Freeze until solid.
5. Top with whipped cream.
6. Sprinkle additional crumbled cookies or chopped nuts on top.
